Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Raymond M. Alexander, Jr. appeared with plaintiff Galen Gee, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Hayes D. Miles, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on July 16, 2009. Amended Default was entered on October 14, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 20, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Galen Gee, and against the Defaulted Defendant Hayes D. Miles, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $0.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,945.75.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Punitive Damages - $2,000.00.
Costs - $461.26, for a total judgment in the amount of $5,407.01.

It is further Ordered that in the event that a delivery of the property in question cannot be had, plaintiff may recover from the defendant the value fo the property, which deemed to be $28,000.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Continued To Dec-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
